sentences.sentence: Innovation and entrepreneurship, in the right mix, can bring spectacular results and propel a business ahead of the pack.
sentences.translation: 创新与创业精神若能得到恰当结合，就能带来非凡成果，推动企业领先于同行。

structure.text: can bring spectacular results and propel a business ahead of the pack

difficult_points: in the right mix 是插入性的条件说明，表示两者以恰当方式结合。
bring 与 propel 由 and 并列，共用主语 Innovation and entrepreneurship。

sentences.sentence: Across a diverse range of commercial successes, from the Hills Hoist clothes line to the Cochlear ear implant, it is hard to generalize beyond saying the creators tapped into something consumers could not wait to get their hands on.
sentences.translation: 纵观从 Hills Hoist 晾衣架到 Cochlear 人工耳蜗等形形色色的商业成功案例，除了一点之外很难概括出共同规律：创造者抓住了消费者迫不及待想得到的东西。

structure.text: Across a diverse range of commercial successes, from the Hills Hoist clothes line to the Cochlear ear implant
beyond saying the creators tapped into something consumers could not wait to get their hands on

difficult_points: it 是形式主语，真正说明“难以概括”的内容由 to generalize 表达。
consumers could not wait to get their hands on 是省略关系代词的定语从句，修饰 something。

sentences.sentence: However, most ideas never make it to the market.
sentences.translation: 然而，大多数创意最终都无法进入市场。

structure.text: never make it to the market

difficult_points: However 承接上文成功案例并引出转折。
make it to 并非“制造”，而是“成功到达、进入”。

sentences.sentence: Some ideas that innovators are spruiking to potential investors include new water-saving shower heads, a keyless locking system, ping-pong balls that keep pollution out of rainwater tanks, making teeth grow from stem cells inserted in the gum, and technology to stop LPG tanks from exploding.
sentences.translation: 创新者向潜在投资者大力推介的一些创意包括：新型节水花洒、无钥匙锁具系统、防止污染物进入雨水箱的乒乓球、利用植入牙龈的干细胞让牙齿重新生长，以及防止液化石油气罐爆炸的技术。

structure.text: Some ideas that innovators are spruiking to potential investors

new water-saving shower heads, a keyless locking system, ping-pong balls that keep pollution out of rainwater tanks, making teeth grow from stem cells inserted in the gum, and technology to stop LPG tanks from exploding

difficult_points: that innovators are spruiking to potential investors 是定语从句，修饰 Some ideas。
inserted in the gum 是过去分词短语，后置修饰 stem cells。

sentences.sentence: Grant Kearney, chief executive of the Innovation Xchange, which connects businesses to innovation networks, says he hears of great business ideas that he knows will never get on the market.
sentences.translation: Innovation Xchange 的首席执行官格兰特·卡尼说，他听说过一些很棒的商业创意，但他知道它们永远不会进入市场；该机构负责把企业与创新网络连接起来。

structure.text: Grant Kearney, chief executive of the Innovation Xchange, which connects businesses to innovation networks
he hears of great business ideas that he knows will never get on the market

difficult_points: chief executive of the Innovation Xchange 是 Grant Kearney 的同位语。
which 引导非限制性定语从句，修饰 Innovation Xchange；that 从句则修饰 business ideas。

sentences.sentence: "Ideas by themselves are absolutely useless,"he says.
sentences.translation: “创意本身毫无用处，”他说。
difficult_points: by themselves 强调“仅凭创意本身”，而非创意在任何情况下都无用。
原文引号后缺少空格（","he），这是排版异常，不影响 he says 作为引述语。

sentences.sentence: "An idea only becomes innovation when it is connected to the right resources and capabilities".
sentences.translation: “只有当一个创意与合适的资源和能力结合起来时，它才会成为创新。”

structure.text: when it is connected to the right resources and capabilities

difficult_points: only 与 when 从句共同表达“只有在……时才……”。
it 指代 An idea，is connected 是被动语态。

sentences.sentence: One of Australia's latest innovation successes stems from a lemon-scented bath-room cleaner called Shower Power, the formula for which was concocted in a factory in Yatala, Queensland.
sentences.translation: 澳大利亚近期的一项创新成功源自一种名为 Shower Power、带柠檬香味的浴室清洁剂，其配方是在昆士兰州亚塔拉的一家工厂调制出来的。

structure.text: One of Australia's latest innovation successes
stems from a lemon-scented bath-room cleaner called Shower Power
the formula for which was concocted in a factory in Yatala, Queensland

difficult_points: called Shower Power 是过去分词短语，修饰 cleaner。
the formula for which 中 which 指 Shower Power，整个从句补充说明其配方。

sentences.sentence: In 1995, Tom Quinn and John Heron bought a struggling cleaning products business, OzKleen, for 250,000.
sentences.translation: 1995 年，汤姆·奎因和约翰·赫伦以 25 万的价格买下了经营困难的清洁用品企业 OzKleen。

structure.text: bought a struggling cleaning products business, OzKleen, for 250,000

difficult_points: struggling 在此表示企业经营困难，而非字面上的“挣扎”。
OzKleen 是 cleaning products business 的同位语；原文金额未标明货币单位。

sentences.sentence: It was selling 100 different kinds of cleaning products, mainly in bulk.
sentences.translation: 当时它销售 100 种不同的清洁产品，主要采用大宗销售方式。

structure.text: was selling 100 different kinds of cleaning products

difficult_points: It 指上一句中的 OzKleen。
was selling 用过去进行时描述收购当时企业持续存在的经营状况。

sentences.sentence: The business was in bad shape, the cleaning formulas were ineffective and environmentally harsh, and there were few regular clients.
sentences.translation: 这家企业状况很糟：清洁配方效果不佳且不环保，固定客户也寥寥无几。

structure.text: The business was in bad shape
the cleaning formulas were ineffective and environmentally harsh

difficult_points: 三个并列分句共同说明企业被收购时的困境。
there were few 表示“几乎没有”，语气比 a few 更消极。

sentences.sentence: Now Shower Power is claimed to be the top-selling bathroom cleaning product in the country.
sentences.translation: 如今，据称 Shower Power 已成为全国销量最高的浴室清洁产品。

structure.text: is claimed to be the top-selling bathroom cleaning product in the country

difficult_points: is claimed to be 是被动报告结构，表示“据称是”，不把说法当作无来源的绝对事实。
top-selling 是复合形容词，修饰 bathroom cleaning product。

sentences.sentence: In the past 12 months ,almost four million bottles of OzKleen's Power products have been sold and the company forecasts 2004 sales of 10 million bottles.
sentences.translation: 过去 12 个月里，OzKleen 的 Power 系列产品已售出近 400 万瓶，公司预计 2004 年销量将达到 1000 万瓶。

structure.text: almost four million bottles of OzKleen's Power products have been sold
the company forecasts 2004 sales of 10 million bottles

difficult_points: have been sold 是现在完成时的被动语态，强调截至当前的累计销量。
原文在 months 后出现多余空格和逗号前空格，属于排版异常。

sentences.sentence: The company's, sales in 2003 reached $11 million, with 700k of business being exports.
sentences.translation: 该公司 2003 年的销售额达到 1100 万美元，其中出口业务为 70 万美元。
difficult_points: with 700k of business being exports 是 with 独立结构，补充出口业务规模。
company's 后的逗号明显多余；700k 按语境表示 70 万，但原文未重复货币符号。

sentences.sentence: In particular, Shower Power is making big inroads on the British market.
sentences.translation: 尤其值得一提的是，Shower Power 正在大举开拓英国市场。

structure.text: is making big inroads on the British market

difficult_points: is making 用进行时强调市场拓展正在发生。
make inroads on 在商业语境中表示逐步进入并扩大市场份额。

sentences.sentence: OzKleen's turnaround began when Quinn and Heron hired an industrial chemist to revitalize the product line.
sentences.translation: OzKleen 的转机始于奎因和赫伦聘请一名工业化学师来重振产品线之时。

structure.text: when Quinn and Heron hired an industrial chemist to revitalize the product line

difficult_points: when 从句说明 turnaround began 的时间和契机。
to revitalize the product line 是目的状语，说明聘请化学师的目的。

sentences.sentence: Market research showed that people were looking for a better cleaner for the bathroom, universally regarded as the hardest room in the home to clean.
sentences.translation: 市场调查显示，人们一直在寻找更好用的浴室清洁剂；浴室被普遍认为是家中最难清洁的房间。

structure.text: that people were looking for a better cleaner for the bathroom, universally regarded as the hardest room in the home to clean

difficult_points: universally regarded as ... 是过去分词短语，后置补充说明 bathroom。
to clean 修饰 the hardest room，主动形式表达“最难清洁的房间”。

sentences.sentence: The company also wanted to make the product formulas more environmentally friendly One of Tom Quinn's sons, Peter, aged 24 at the time, began working with the chemist on the formulas, looking at the potential for citrus-based cleaning products.
sentences.translation: 公司还希望让产品配方更加环保。汤姆·奎因的一个儿子彼得当时 24 岁，他开始与化学师共同研究配方，并考察柑橘类清洁产品的潜力。

structure.text: The company also wanted to make the product formulas more environmentally friendly
One of Tom Quinn's sons, Peter, aged 24 at the time, began working with the chemist on the formulas
looking at the potential for citrus-based cleaning products

difficult_points: friendly 与 One 之间明显缺少句号；为保证原文完整，这里保留在同一条中并按两个主句理解。
Peter 是 One of Tom Quinn's sons 的同位语，aged 24 at the time 是补充说明。

sentences.sentence: He detested all the chlorine-based cleaning products that dominated the market.
sentences.translation: 他厌恶当时主导市场的所有含氯清洁产品。

structure.text: detested all the chlorine-based cleaning products

difficult_points: He 指上一句中的 Peter。
that dominated the market 是限制性定语从句，修饰 cleaning products。

sentences.sentence: "We didn't want to use chlorine, simple as that,"he says."It offers bad working conditions and there's no money in it."Peter looked at citrus ingredients, such as orange peel, to replace the petroleum by-products in cleaners.
sentences.translation: “我们不想使用氯，就是这么简单，”他说，“它会造成恶劣的工作条件，而且也无利可图。”彼得于是研究了橙皮等柑橘类原料，用它们替代清洁剂中的石油副产品。

structure.text: We didn't want to use chlorine, simple as that
It offers bad working conditions and there's no money in it
Peter looked at citrus ingredients, such as orange peel, to replace the petroleum by-products in cleaners

difficult_points: 原文 he says、第二段引语和 Peter 之间均缺空格，属于引号与断句排版异常，语义上是引语加后续叙述。
to replace ... 是目的状语；其中 it 在 there's no money in it 中指使用氯这件事或含氯产品。

sentences.sentence: He is credited with finding the Shower Power formula.
sentences.translation: 人们认为是他发现了 Shower Power 的配方。
difficult_points: is credited with 表示某项成果被归功于某人。
finding 是动名词，作介词 with 的宾语。

expressions.meaning_zh: 因……而获誉；被认为完成了……

sentences.sentence: "The head,"he says.
sentences.translation: “关键在脑子，”他说。
difficult_points: The head 是省略式表达，按上下文大意可理解为配方或创意的关键在头脑。
原文引号后缺少空格，且这段引语可能因 OCR 丢失了前后文字，不能据此补造原句。

sentences.sentence: The company is the recipe is in a vault somewhere and in my sole owner of the intellectual property.
sentences.translation: 该句原文疑有严重错序；结合可辨内容，大意可能是：配方存放在某处的保险库中，而知识产权归说话者独有。

structure.text: the recipe is in a vault somewhere
and in my sole owner of the intellectual property

difficult_points: 原文存在明显 OCR 错序，The company is 与 and in my sole owner 均无法构成合乎语法的完整结构。
可可靠识别的部分是 the recipe is in a vault somewhere；翻译对其余内容仅作谨慎概括，没有改写原句。

sentences.sentence: To begin with, Shower Power was sold only in commercial quantities but Tom Quinn decided to sell it in 750ml bottles after the constant "raves"from customers at their retail store at Beenleigh, near Brisbane.
sentences.translation: 起初，Shower Power 只按商业用量销售；但在布里斯班附近比恩利的零售店里，顾客不断交口称赞，于是汤姆·奎因决定改用 750 毫升瓶装出售。

structure.text: Shower Power was sold only in commercial quantities
but Tom Quinn decided to sell it in 750ml bottles after the constant "raves"from customers at their retail store at Beenleigh, near Brisbane

difficult_points: but 连接初期销售方式与后来改用零售瓶装的转变。
raves 带引号表示顾客的热烈好评；原文引号后缺少空格。

sentences.sentence: Customers were travel- ling long distances to buy supplies.
sentences.translation: 顾客不惜长途跋涉前来购买。
difficult_points: travel- ling 是排版换行造成的断词，应按 travelling 理解，但原文拼写予以保留。
to buy supplies 表示顾客长途出行的目的。

sentences.sentence: Others began writing to OzKleen to say how good Shower Power was.
sentences.translation: 还有一些顾客开始写信给 OzKleen，称赞 Shower Power 非常好用。

structure.text: to say how good Shower Power was

difficult_points: Others 指其他顾客，与上一句的 Customers 相呼应。
how good Shower Power was 是 say 的宾语从句，how 表示程度。

sentences.sentence: "We did a dummy label and went to see Woolworths,"Tom Quinn says.
sentences.translation: “我们做了一个样品标签，然后去找 Woolworths 洽谈，”汤姆·奎因说。

structure.text: did a dummy label and went to see Woolworths

difficult_points: did 与 went 是并列谓语，表示先制作样品标签再接触零售商。
dummy label 指用于展示或测试的样品标签；引号后缺空格是原文排版问题。

sentences.sentence: The Woolworths buyer took a bottle home and was able to remove a stain from her basin that had been impossible to shift.
sentences.translation: Woolworths 的采购员把一瓶产品带回家，竟然清除了洗脸盆上一块此前怎么也去不掉的污渍。

structure.text: took a bottle home and was able to remove a stain from her basin
that had been impossible to shift

difficult_points: that 引导定语从句，修饰 a stain。
had been impossible 使用过去完成时，表示在这次成功清除之前一直无法去除。

sentences.sentence: From that point on, she championed the product and OzKleen had its first super- market order, for a palette of Shower Power worth $3000.
sentences.translation: 从那以后，她开始大力支持这款产品，OzKleen 也收到了第一笔超市订单：一托盘价值 3000 美元的 Shower Power。

structure.text: and OzKleen had its first super- market order, for a palette of Shower Power worth $3000

difficult_points: she 指上一句的 Woolworths buyer；championed 表示她积极推动产品上架。
super- market 是断词排版；palette 在此很可能是 pallet（托盘）的拼写或 OCR 错误。

sentences.sentence: "We were over the moon,"says OzKleen's financial controller, Belinda McDonnell.
sentences.translation: “我们欣喜若狂，”OzKleen 的财务主管贝琳达·麦克唐奈说。

structure.text: says OzKleen's financial controller, Belinda McDonnell

difficult_points: over the moon 是习语，表示极其高兴。
Belinda McDonnell 是 financial controller 的同位语；引号后缺空格属排版异常。

sentences.sentence: Shower Power was released in Australian supermarkets in 1997 and became the top-selling product in its category within six months.
sentences.translation: Shower Power 于 1997 年进入澳大利亚各大超市，并在六个月内成为同类产品中的销量冠军。

structure.text: was released in Australian supermarkets in 1997
and became the top-selling product in its category within six months

difficult_points: was released 与 became 构成并列谓语，分别说明上市和市场表现。
within six months 表示“不超过六个月便完成”，强调速度。

sentences.sentence: It was all hands on deck cat the factory, labeling and bottling Shower Power to keep up with demand.
sentences.translation: 工厂里所有人都得齐上阵，为 Shower Power 贴标签、装瓶，以满足需求。

structure.text: It was all hands on deck cat the factory

difficult_points: all hands on deck 是习语，表示所有人都投入工作。
cat the factory 明显应为 at the factory 的 OCR 错误；原文保留 cat，翻译按上下文理解。

sentences.sentence: OzKleen ditched all other products and rebuilt the business around Shower Power.
sentences.translation: OzKleen 放弃了其他所有产品，围绕 Shower Power 重新打造公司业务。

structure.text: and rebuilt the business around Shower Power

difficult_points: ditched 与 rebuilt 是并列动作，体现公司战略的彻底转向。
around Shower Power 表示以该产品为业务核心，而非空间位置。

sentences.sentence: This stage, recalls McDonnell, was very tough.
sentences.translation: 麦克唐奈回忆说，这一阶段非常艰难。
difficult_points: recalls McDonnell 是插入式引述语，去掉后主干仍是 This stage was very tough。
倒装式 reporting clause 把谓语 recalls 放在主语 McDonnell 前。

sentences.sentence: "It was hand-to-mouth, cash flow was very difficult," she says.
sentences.translation: “当时只能勉强维持，现金流非常紧张，”她说。
difficult_points: hand-to-mouth 在企业语境中表示资金只够勉强周转。
It 概括当时的经营处境；两个逗号连接的分句共同描述资金困难。

sentences.sentence: OzKleen had to pay new-line fees to supermarket chains, which also squeezed margins.
sentences.translation: OzKleen 不得不向连锁超市支付新品上架费，这也进一步压缩了利润空间。

structure.text: had to pay new-line fees to supermarket chains

difficult_points: which 指代向超市支付新品上架费这件事，而非单指 supermarket chains。
squeezed margins 表示费用使利润率下降。

sentences.sentence: OzKleen's next big break came when the daughter of a Coles Myer executive used the product while on holidays in Queensland and convinced her father that Shower Power should be in Coles supermarkets.
sentences.translation: OzKleen 的下一次重大机遇来自一位 Coles Myer 高管的女儿：她在昆士兰度假时使用了该产品，并说服父亲让 Shower Power 进入 Coles 超市。

structure.text: when the daughter of a Coles Myer executive used the product while on holidays in Queensland and convinced her father that Shower Power should be in Coles supermarkets

difficult_points: when 从句交代 big break 出现的具体经过，而不仅是时间点。
that Shower Power should be in Coles supermarkets 是 convinced her father 的宾语补足内容。

sentences.sentence: Despite the product success, Peter Quinn says the company was wary of how long the sales would last and hesitated to spend money on upgrading the manufacturing process.
sentences.translation: 尽管产品取得了成功，彼得·奎因说，公司仍担心热销能维持多久，因此迟迟不愿花钱升级生产流程。

structure.text: the company was wary of how long the sales would last and hesitated to spend money on upgrading the manufacturing process

difficult_points: Despite 后接名词短语，表示让步，不是从句。
was wary of 与 hesitated 是并列谓语；how long the sales would last 是介词 of 的宾语从句。

sentences.sentence: As a result, he remembers long periods of working round the clock to keep up with orders.
sentences.translation: 因此，他记得自己曾长时间昼夜不停地工作，以赶上订单需求。

structure.text: he remembers long periods of working round the clock

difficult_points: working 是动名词，作介词 of 的宾语，说明那些漫长时期在做什么。
to keep up with orders 表示持续加班的目的。

sentences.sentence: Small tanks were still being used, so batches were small and bottles were labelled and filled manually.
sentences.translation: 当时仍在使用小型储罐，所以每批产量很小，瓶子也只能靠人工贴标和灌装。

structure.text: Small tanks were still being used
and bottles were labelled and filled manually

difficult_points: were still being used 是过去进行时的被动语态，强调当时持续使用旧设备。
so 引出结果，后面两个并列分句分别说明批量小和依赖人工。

sentences.sentence: The privately owned OzKleen relied on cash flow to expand.
sentences.translation: 作为一家私营企业，OzKleen 依靠自身现金流来扩张。
difficult_points: privately owned 是过去分词构成的复合修饰语，说明公司性质。
to expand 表示依靠现金流的目的。

sentences.sentence: "The equipment could not keep up with demand," Peter Quinn says.
sentences.translation: “设备跟不上需求，”彼得·奎因说。

structure.text: could not keep up with demand

difficult_points: could not 表示当时设备能力不足，而不是主观不愿。
keep up with demand 指生产能力无法匹配增长的需求。

sentences.sentence: Eventually a new bottling machine was bought for $50,000 in the hope of streamlining production, but he says: "We got ripped off."
sentences.translation: 最终，他们花 5 万美元买了一台新灌装机，希望简化生产流程，但他说：“我们被骗了。”

structure.text: Eventually a new bottling machine was bought for $50,000 in the hope of streamlining production

difficult_points: was bought 是被动语态，未明说购买者，但语境指 OzKleen。
in the hope of 后接动名词说明购买目的；got ripped off 表示遭到欺骗或被严重宰价。

sentences.sentence: Since then, he has been developing a new automated bottling machine that can control the amount of foam produced in the liquid, so that bottles can be filled more effectively- "I love coming up with new ideas."
sentences.translation: 从那以后，他一直在研发一种新的自动灌装机，它能控制液体中产生的泡沫量，从而更高效地灌装瓶子——“我喜欢想出新点子。”

structure.text: Since then, he has been developing a new automated bottling machine
that can control the amount of foam produced in the liquid
so that bottles can be filled more effectively

difficult_points: has been developing 是现在完成进行时，表示研发从过去持续到现在。
produced in the liquid 是过去分词短语，修饰 foam；句末 effectively- 的连字符用作破折转引，排版不规范。

sentences.sentence: The machine is being patented.
sentences.translation: 这台机器正在申请专利。
difficult_points: The machine 指上一句所述的新型自动灌装机。
is being patented 是现在进行时的被动语态，表示专利申请正在进行。

expressions.meaning_zh: 获得专利；申请专利保护

sentences.sentence: Peter Quinn says OzKleen's approach to research and development is open slather.
sentences.translation: 彼得·奎因说，OzKleen 对研发采取的是一种放手尝试、不设限制的方式。

structure.text: OzKleen's approach to research and development is open slather

difficult_points: says 后省略了宾语从句连接词 that。
open slather 是澳大利亚英语口语，表示不受限制、可以放手去做。

sentences.sentence: "If I need it, I get it.
sentences.translation: “如果我需要什么，我就把它弄到手。
difficult_points: If 从句提出条件，主句说明直接采取行动的研发作风。
本句开引号要到后续引语结束才闭合，因此此处没有右引号是原文连续引语结构。

expressions.text: if I need it, I get it

sentences.sentence: It is about doing something simple that no one else is doing.
sentences.translation: 关键在于做一些简单、却没有其他人在做的事情。

structure.text: that no one else is doing

difficult_points: It 概括前文所说的研发思路，be about 表示“关键在于”。
that no one else is doing 是定语从句，修饰 something simple。

sentences.sentence: Most of these things are just sitting in front of people ... it's just seeing the opportunities."
sentences.translation: 这些东西大多就摆在人们眼前……关键只是要看见其中的机会。”

structure.text: are just sitting in front of people

difficult_points: sitting in front of people 是比喻，表示机会显而易见却未被注意。
it's just seeing 使用动名词作表语；句末引号闭合从 G-02 开始的整段引语。

sentences.sentence: With a tried and tested product, OzKleen is expanding overseas and developing more Power-brand household products.
sentences.translation: 凭借一款经过充分验证的产品，OzKleen 正在拓展海外市场，并开发更多 Power 品牌的家用产品。

structure.text: With a tried and tested product
is expanding overseas and developing more Power-brand household products

difficult_points: With 短语说明公司扩张所依托的条件。
expanding 与 developing 是现在进行时中的并列动作。

sentences.sentence: Tom Quinn, who previously ran a real estate agency, says: "We are competing with the same market all over the world, the cleaning products are sold everywhere."
sentences.translation: 曾经营房地产中介公司的汤姆·奎因说：“我们面对的是遍布全球的同一个市场，因为清洁产品到处都有人销售。”

structure.text: Tom Quinn, who previously ran a real estate agency
We are competing with the same market all over the world, the cleaning products are sold everywhere

difficult_points: who previously ran a real estate agency 是非限制性定语从句，补充 Tom Quinn 的经历。
引语内两个分句以逗号连接，逻辑上后句解释全球市场相通的原因；compete with the same market 搭配略不自然但按原文保留。

sentences.sentence: Shower Power, known as Bath Power in Britain, was launched four years ago with the help of an export development grant from the Federal Government.
sentences.translation: Shower Power 在英国名为 Bath Power，四年前借助联邦政府的出口发展补助进入了当地市场。

structure.text: Shower Power, known as Bath Power in Britain
with the help of an export development grant from the Federal Government

difficult_points: known as Bath Power in Britain 是过去分词短语，补充产品在英国的名称。
was launched 是被动语态，结合上下文指产品在英国上市。

sentences.sentence: "We wanted to do it straight away because we realised we had the same opportunities worldwide."
sentences.translation: “我们想立即行动，因为我们意识到世界各地都有同样的机会。”

structure.text: We wanted to do it straight away
because we realised we had the same opportunities worldwide

difficult_points: it 指在海外、尤其英国推出产品这件事。
we had the same opportunities worldwide 是 realised 后省略 that 的宾语从句。

sentences.sentence: OzKleen is already number three in the British market, and the next stop is France.
sentences.translation: OzKleen 已在英国市场排名第三，下一站将是法国。

structure.text: OzKleen is already number three in the British market
and the next stop is France

difficult_points: number three 在这里表示市场排名第三。
the next stop is France 是比喻说法，表示下一个计划进入的市场是法国。

expressions.meaning_zh: 下一站；下一个目标市场

sentences.sentence: The Power range includes cleaning products for carpets, kitchens and pre-wash stain removal.
sentences.translation: Power 系列包括地毯清洁剂、厨房清洁剂和洗前去渍产品。

structure.text: cleaning products for carpets, kitchens and pre-wash stain removal

difficult_points: for carpets, kitchens and pre-wash stain removal 并列说明产品的三类用途。
pre-wash stain removal 指正式洗涤前进行的去渍处理。

sentences.sentence: The Quinn and Heron families are still involved.
sentences.translation: 奎因家族和赫伦家族至今仍参与公司经营。
difficult_points: The Quinn and Heron families 指两位创始人各自的家族。
involved 省略了具体介词宾语，结合上下文指仍参与 OzKleen 的经营。

sentences.sentence: OzKleen has been approached with offers to buy the company, but Tom Quinn says he is happy with things as they are.
sentences.translation: 已经有人联系 OzKleen 并提出收购公司，但汤姆·奎因说，他对维持现状很满意。

structure.text: OzKleen has been approached with offers to buy the company
he is happy with things as they are

difficult_points: has been approached 是现在完成时的被动语态，表示收购邀约已经出现。
as they are 是方式从句，修饰 things，意为“按目前的样子、维持现状”。

expressions.meaning_zh: 收到……方面的报价或邀约

sentences.sentence: "We're having too much fun."
sentences.translation: “我们现在干得太开心了。”
difficult_points: We're 是 We are 的缩写。
现在进行时 are having 强调他们目前经营公司的愉快状态，也是拒绝出售的幽默理由。
